## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Sofa;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Sofa { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
armchair, furniture, leisure, lounge, loveseat, couch

## Categories
home
